response.justification: Strong technical seniority and current MCP/agentic infrastructure work are directly relevant to core responsibilities, but the candidate lacks the required 8+ years of AI/ML production experience. Only ~1 year demonstrated in AI-agent infrastructure (current role since April 2025), with primary career background in web/GIS/infrastructure. Would require verification of depth in current AI work, Python proficiency, and knowledge of vector databases, RAG architectures, and multi-agent frameworks.
strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Staff level, directly relevant to core platform responsibilities
19 years software engineering experience with proven ability to architect systems, lead technical teams, and ship production-grade code at scale
Deep cloud infrastructure expertise (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) with demonstrated ability to design integration points and build observability frameworks
concerns: Primary career in web/GIS/infrastructure development, not AI/ML; cannot verify 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions
No explicit mention of Python experience (required), no demonstrated vector database or RAG architecture work, no multi-agent framework exposure
Current AI-agent role only ~1.3 years old; insufficient proven depth in LLM optimization, evaluation pipelines, and frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure role at Staff level
Lacks documented 8+ years AI/ML production experience
